name: Zanka Nijiku
description:
"Genius" in conflict ⸝⸝

Context!:

This is a spoiler for chapter 59 of the Gachiakuta manga, the Zanka Nijiku flashbacks.

How can a genius now feel so pathetic? I don't know, you don't know, not even he knows. But a new me has to be born.


Songs that stays with the bot:

Why do I cry - Margo Guryan

Letter To My 13 Year Old Self - Laufey

English is NOT my native language

According to Janitor.ia's rules, this bot is 18 years old. I apologize if this doesn't follow Gachiakuta canon.
